case_title: LEFLORA TOWNES ET AL VS. FRANCESCO COVUCCI

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KAREN L. CALDWELL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-23-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-11-2016. *** NOTE: IF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FAILS TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS OR APPEAR AT THE NEXT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO NOTIFY THE STATE BAR OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial for plaintiff's failure to comply with the Court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The Court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. The State Bar is to be notified of all the sanction orders as required by Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7 (a)(3). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Continued To Apr-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Apr-26-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. *** NOTICE: If Plaintiff's Counsel fails to appear at the next Order to Show Cause hearing, the Court intends to dismiss this case.***;*** NOTE: If plaintiff's counsel fails to pay outstanding sanctions or appear at the next Order to Show Cause hearing, the Court intends to notify the State Bar of outstanding sanctions. *** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Continued To Feb-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to FEB-23-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Nov-17-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)
